notes: All numeric values are placeholders. Replace nulls only with dated supplier quotes or invoices.

mixed_sticker_sheet.notes: Custom mixed sticker sheet cost. Do not guess.

printed_sheet_matte_ol_or_vendor.notes: Matte printed sheet from OnlineLabels/custom vendor or equivalent. Use quote or receipt only.

printed_sheet_poly_or_vendor.notes: Poly/weatherproof printed sheet from vendor. Use quote or receipt only.

stock_color_sheet.notes: Full solid-color sheet cost. Must distinguish true POD from inventory/pick-pack.

mixed_topoff_sheet.notes: Hybrid top-off sheet cost for rare colors.

placement_board_12in.notes: 12 inch placement board or printed grid board.

board_12_black.notes: 12 inch black-base board for First Hello validation.

board_16.notes: 16 inch board or tiled board quote placeholder.

board_24.notes: 24 inch board or tiled panel quote placeholder.

instruction_card.notes: Printed instruction card or build guide insert.

packaging.notes: Packaging for board, sheets, instructions, and spares.

rigid_mailer_13x13.notes: Rigid mailer for 12 inch sample/package validation.

insert_card.notes: Printed insert card for validation package.

shipping_12_estimate.notes: Placeholder only. Replace with actual carrier quote or receipt.

shipping_16_estimate.notes: Placeholder only. Replace with actual carrier quote or receipt.

shipping_24_estimate.notes: Placeholder only. Replace with actual carrier quote or receipt.

sample_cost.notes: Supplier sample cost from current quote only.

die_setup_fee.notes: Die/kiss-cut setup fee from current supplier quote only.
